name: Nightwatch Protocol
short_description: Nightwatch Protocol is a tense CCTV horror game where you must survive until 7:00 AM. An intruder is inside your home, and your only defense is the security system. Watch camera feeds, track movement, and react fast. One mistake could cost you everything. Stay alert and make it through the night.
detailed_description:
Nightwatch Protocol is a tense surveillance horror experience where survival depends on awareness, timing, and nerve.

An intruder has broken into your home. Using your CCTV security system, you must monitor their movements and prevent them from getting too close.

Switch between live camera feeds, listen for subtle audio cues, and react quickly to suspicious activity. Your defensive options are limited, and every decision mat

Stay alert. Survive until 7:00 AM.
